summary: Added explicit conservative job-level timeouts to hosted Linux CI, hosted macOS CI, and nightly deep-checks without changing commands or action versions.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux CI, macOS CI, and nightly deep-checks jobs declare conservative `timeout-minutes` values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml sets linux to 45 minutes and macos to 30 minutes; .github/workflows/nightly.yml sets deep-checks to 180 minutes.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing commands and action versions remain unchanged.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The workflow diff adds only job-level `timeout-minutes` keys; step commands and `uses:` versions are unchanged.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Workflow syntax and repo hygiene checks pass.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: `nix develop -c actionlint .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/nightly.yml`, `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check`, `nix develop -c just check`, and `git diff --check` passed; results are recorded in evidence/m4-ci-job-timeouts/commands.log.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records workflow validation and qd reports.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-ci-job-timeouts/commands.log records validation, and completion plus audit reports are under reports/qd/m4-ci-job-timeouts/.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-ci-job-timeouts/notes.md scopes the work to GitHub Actions job metadata only.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node changes GitHub Actions job metadata only; local workflow syntax and repository hygiene checks cover the acceptance without product runtime claims.
